TextENGNew: ``Good work, everyone. ...Oh, and I'm sorry about today. I got caught up talking with my friend...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahaha, don't worry about it. Your boyfriend came to see you, so of course you'd want to chat.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh... oh, no... he's not exactly my... boyfriend...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Even so, he's even nicer than you described. He rushed to your rescue and chased those thugs away, right?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Ah, yes. Thanks to him... I was saved.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Kyaa~ How cool~♪ Having a handsome hero swoop in to rescue you when you're surrounded by bad guys... that's a girl's ultimate fantasy, isn't it~?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ah, ahaha... Kei-chan is, well, he's strong, at least...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``But neither of you got hurt, so that's a relief. By the way, why did those delinquents pick on you in the first place?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Well... I was just walking down the street normally, and they started hitting on me... haha.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Wow, so it was street harassment? Those types are showing up even in Okinomiya now. We should be careful too...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You're right. I'll be more careful from now on. Next time, I'll smack them with an extendable baton or something. Ahahaha~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Just don't use a knife, okay? Nowadays you can get arrested just for carrying a utility knife around.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Roger that~ ...Well then, I'll head out first. Good work today, everyone~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Sonozaki-san seemed to be in awfully high spirits, didn't she? She must have been really happy.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahh~ I wish I could find someone nice too. Wouldn't it be wonderful if there were a prince charming somewhere out there who'd come running whenever I was in trouble~?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...But I definitely wouldn't want anyone from that Dessert Festa crowd, that's for sure.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
